arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic boss delighted at emphatic win over League One promotion rivals
arts.sum: “It is some performance to come here to second place and do what we did under the pressure we had. Luke Berry quickly made it 2-0 with a right-footed finish after the ball dropped to him in the box as the hosts failed to clear Thierry Small’s diagonal delivery which had been headed down by Jones.

arts.ttl: Wycombe’s automatic promotion hopes dented after thrashing by Charlton
arts.sum: The Addicks are still in with a chance of the top two.

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic set for summer talks with loanee midfielder
arts.sum: “We felt it was best for Terry to go and get games – that has proved a very, very good decision. Charlton Athletic manager Nathan Jones says there will be a discussion over Terry Taylor’s long-term future in the summer.
